_comment: Sample MCP configuration for Layers 5 and 6. For Claude Code this goes in ~/.claude.json (top-level 'mcpServers' key). For Cursor, see their MCP docs — same schema.

qdrant-memory._comment: Layer 5 — semantic vector search. Point at your own Qdrant instance.

msam-memory._comment: Layer 6 — cognitive memory with activation decay. Requires a running MSAM instance (see scripts/msam-mcp-wrapper.py or https://github.com/msam-project/msam).

_alternative_layer_6._comment: If you prefer Zep or Letta over MSAM, swap msam-memory above with one of these. Only enable ONE Layer 6 server at a time — running multiple cognitive memories creates contradictions the agent will not resolve.
